description.ko: 음향 주파수를 역동적인 3D 건축적 빛 구조로 변환하는 몰입형 디지털 아트 설치물입니다. 소리가 디지털 공간에 미치는 물리적 영향을 탐구합니다.
description.en: An immersive digital art installation that transforms acoustic frequencies into dynamic, 3D architectural light structures. It explores the physical impact of sound on digital space.

prompt: A high-tech digital art installation called ECHO-0, showcasing sound visualization. Complex geometric light patterns vibrating in a dark void, neon blue and obsidian color palette, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, ethereal sound waves turned into physical crystalline structures.
